caption: A man wearing a green camouflage baseball cap, headphones, and a dark green t-shirt with the white text "I CON NEVER DO SHIT IT WORK" is seated in a studio. He is positioned in front of a professional microphone on a boom arm. Behind him is a wall decorated with numerous framed photographs and a white mannequin wearing a white t-shirt. To the right, clothing racks and a chair are visible. In the lower corners of the scene, there are red and black logos, including one that reads "DR. FELLY TOT". As the sequence progresses, the man begins with a smile, gesturing with his left hand. He then moves his hand to adjust his headphones. By the end of the sequence, his expression becomes more neutral and serious as he looks toward someone off-camera and speaks.
